2606.10699.title: Using the YOLOv12 Model for Verifying the Correct Color Sequence of Wires in Network Cables (Patch Cords) on the Production Line
2606.10699.paper_summary: In the production process of network cables, ensuring the correct color sequence of wire pairs inside the standard connector plays a critical role in the final performance of the cable, as any misplacement or color-ordering error can lead to defective products and impose significant costs. Traditional inspection methods based on visual examination through digital microscopes are typically time-consuming, tedious, and prone to human error. In this study, an intelligent system based on the twelfth version of the YOLO1 object detection model was developed to identify the position and verify the correct color sequence of wires in patch cords. The dataset used consisted of 2,500 images captured from microscopic views of network connectors, which were divided into 70% for training, 15% for validation, and 15% for testing. The proposed model, leveraging a single-stage architecture and attention mechanisms during learning, achieved highly accurate wire detection with approximately 98% precision. Additionally, the overall mean accuracy, classification precision, and recall were around 95%, 99%, and 98%, respectively. The results demonstrate that this system can reliably and in real time verify the correctness of wire color sequencing on the production line without the need for human intervention, thereby reducing human error and enhancing efficiency in the manufacturing process.
2606.10699.paper_summary_zh: 在網路電纜的生產過程中，確保標準連接器內部線對的正確顏色順序對於電纜的最終性能至關重要，因為任何錯位或顏色排序錯誤都可能導致缺陷產品並產生重大成本。基於數位顯微鏡的傳統檢查方法通常耗時、繁瑣，且容易出現人為錯誤。在本研究中，開發了一種基於第十二版YOLO1物件檢測模型的智能系統，以識別位置並驗證補丁線中電線的正確顏色順序。所使用的數據集由2,500張從網路連接器的顯微視圖捕獲的圖像組成，這些圖像被劃分為70%用於訓練，15%用於驗證，和15%用於測試。所提出的模型利用單階段架構和學習過程中的注意力機制，實現了約98%的高精度電線檢測。此外，整體平均準確率、分類精度和召回率分別約為95%、99%和98%。結果顯示，該系統可以可靠且實時地驗證生產線上電線顏色排序的正確性，而無需人為干預，從而減少人為錯誤並提高製造過程的效率。
2606.10699.author: Amin Doroodchi et.al.
